post.title: Sanctuary Hills House
post.heading: 3D Printing a Sanctuary Hills House from Fallout 4
post.description: Building a House in Sanctuary Hills for the Sole Survivor.
post.content:
> Image © 2020 [Modiphius Entertainment](https://www.modiphius.net)

# Table of contents

# Intro

Modiphius has released multiple `Print at Home` STL packs that can be used to re-create Sanctuary Hills.

Although the `Print at Home` terrain is designed to be printed on a Resin printer there has been some success at [printing them on a regular 3D printer](https://modiphius.net/blogs/news/community-interview).

# Sanctuary Hills House

## Walls

![Sanctuary Example House Interior - Parts List](https://www.modiphius.net/cdn/shop/products/FO_SanctuaryHouse_01InteriorPartsList_1280x.jpg)

> Image © 2020 [Modiphius Entertainment](https://www.modiphius.net)
